LanguageData.VFET_Chunk.description: A chunk of rock, carefully picked to have the highest smashing potential.
LanguageData.VFET_Chunk.label: chunk
LanguageData.VFET_Chunk.tools.0.label: rock
LanguageData.VFET_Stake.description: A sharpened wooden log. Can deal substantial damage, but is prone to breaking and deteriorates fast. Good at killing sanguophages.
LanguageData.VFET_Stake.label: stake
LanguageData.VFET_Stake.tools.0.label: shaft
LanguageData.VFET_Stake.tools.1.label: point
